text.title: devops-elk-index-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for devops-elk-index-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Writing directly to the physical index name (e.g., logs-000001) instead of the rollover alias.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When ILM rolls over, the write alias moves to the new index but any code referencing the old index name continues writing stale data to a read-only index, producing 403 errors.
